After your boyfriend comes out as gay, The man you thought was your soulmate. Your whole world was shattered, He used you to hide he was gay. You supported his decisions, but using you pushed you into depression. Your trust issues spiraled making you think all men would use you. You tried to drink your life away to forget it all. And Zercrose found interest in you. "ill prove it all right"
